title: Slovenian Plum Dumplings
description: A traditional Slovenian dessert made with plum dumplings, often enjoyed with a dollop of whipped cream or vanilla ice cream.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, sugar, and eggs.
Add the milk, vanilla extract, and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until smooth.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces.
Roll each piece into a ball and flatten slightly.
Place a plum in the center of each dough ball.
Fold the dough over the plum, and press the edges together to seal.
Boil the dumplings in a large pot of boiling water for 5-7 minutes.
Serve the dumplings with a dollop of whipped cream or vanilla ice cream.
Enjoy your delicious Slovenian plum dumplings!
